criteria.title: Physical loss and defective component established (Clause 4)
criteria.rule_text: ( AND car.loss.is_physical equals true AND car.component.is_defective equals true)

criteria.title: Property falls within an insured category (Clause 5)
Notified underwriters within 30 days of discovery (Clause 11)
JCT-compliant contract in place where property is existing structure (Clause 10)
criteria.rule_text: IF car.property.category equals "existing_structures" THEN car.contract.jct_compliant equals true

criteria.title: Claim is not for rectification of the defective component (Clause 6)
Damage qualification: Clauses 7, 8, 9, 9A, 9B
criteria.rule_text:
OR(
  car.damage.consequence_of_failure equals true,
  car.claim.is_access_damage equals false,
  ( AND car.claim.is_access_damage equals true AND OR(
      ( AND Operator.DEFAULT_TO(car.component.installed_by_subcontractor, false) equals false AND car.defect.origin does not equal "design" AND car.project.value_millions_gbp is at least 100),
      ( AND Operator.DEFAULT_TO(car.component.installed_by_subcontractor, false) equals true AND car.defect.origin does not equal "design" AND car.project.value_millions_gbp is at least 200),
      ( AND car.project.value_millions_gbp is at least 500 AND ( OR Operator.DEFAULT_TO(car.defect.was_known_prior, false) equals false OR Operator.DEFAULT_TO(car.defect.has_engineer_assessment, false) equals true))
    ))
)
